mapper.sql: d.id, d.owner_user_id, u.nickname as owner_nickname, d.name, d.image, d.description, d.category_id, c.name as category_name, d.cook_time_minutes, d.difficulty, d.servings, d.visibility, d.is_featured, d.created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dish d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON d.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE d.category_id = #{categoryId} AND d.status = 1
AND d.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}
ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC, d.created_at DESC

SELECT d.id, d.owner_user_id, u.nickname as owner_nickname, d.name, d.image, d.price, d.description, d.category_id, c.name as category_name, d.cook_time_minutes, d.difficulty, d.servings, d.visibility, d.is_featured, d.status, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM dish d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON d.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM dish d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON d.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.visibility = 'public' ORDER BY d.created_at DESC, d.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM dish d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON d.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId} ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC, d.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM dish d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON d.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC, d.created_at DESC
